SEARCH
Package io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project

Class Ghost

java.lang.Object
io.github.magiccsacademy.csa_project.Ghost
public class Ghost extends Object
The ghost class, that manages each individual ghost/moving sprite with shapes in the screen

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private boolean
    alive
    whether the current ghost is alive
    private final float
    DEATH_DURATION
    A constant for the length of the death animation
    private float
    deathTimer
    A timer used to manage the death animation
    private float
    deathX
    The location of the dead ghost
    private float
    deathY
    The location of the dead ghost
    private float
    horizontalDirection
    The speed of the shield ghost in the horizontal direction

    isDying
    Whether this ghost is currently dying
    private boolean
    isFish
    Whether this ghost object is a fish
    private boolean
    isFulk
    whether this ghost object is Mr.
    private boolean
    isPausing
    Whether the ghost is still (only for shields)
    private boolean
    isShield
    whether this ghost object is a ghost with a shield (circle)
    private ArrayList<Integer>
    shapes
    An arraylist of the shapes on top of the ghost (represented by a shape index 0-3)
    private float
    stateTimer
    A timer used to manage the positioning of a ghost with a shield
    private int
    strlen
    The number of shapes to eliminate from the ghost

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Ghost(int len)
    Constructs a ghost object with a defined number of random shapes.
    Ghost(String s)
    Constructs a ghost object based on the shapes in it.
    Ghost(String s, boolean fulk)
    Constructs a ghost object based on the shapes in it and whether it is Mr.

  • Field Details

    • shapes

      private ArrayList<Integer> shapes
      An arraylist of the shapes on top of the ghost (represented by a shape index 0-3)

    • strlen

      private int strlen
      The number of shapes to eliminate from the ghost

    • isFulk

      private boolean isFulk
      whether this ghost object is Mr. Fulk

    • isFish

      private boolean isFish
      Whether this ghost object is a fish

    • isShield

      private boolean isShield
      whether this ghost object is a ghost with a shield (circle)

    • stateTimer

      private float stateTimer
      A timer used to manage the positioning of a ghost with a shield

    • isPausing

      private boolean isPausing
      Whether the ghost is still (only for shields)

    • horizontalDirection

      private float horizontalDirection
      The speed of the shield ghost in the horizontal direction

    • isDying

      private boolean isDying
      Whether this ghost is currently dying

    • deathTimer

      private float deathTimer
      A timer used to manage the death animation

    • DEATH_DURATION

      private final float DEATH_DURATION
      A constant for the length of the death animation
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • deathX

      private float deathX
      The location of the dead ghost

    • deathY

      private float deathY
      The location of the dead ghost

    • alive

      private boolean alive
      whether the current ghost is alive

  • Constructor Details

    • Ghost

      public Ghost(int len)
      Constructs a ghost object with a defined number of random shapes. isFulk, isFish, and isShield default to false
      Parameters:
      len - the number of shapes

    • Ghost

      public Ghost(String s)
      Constructs a ghost object based on the shapes in it. Determines length using this string parameter Defaults the booleans to false.
      Parameters:
      s - the shapes in this ghost

    • Ghost

      public Ghost(String s, boolean fulk)
      Constructs a ghost object based on the shapes in it and whether it is Mr. Fulk. Sets the length based on the string parameter
      Parameters:
      s - the shapes in this ghost
      fulk - whether this ghost is Mr. Fulk

  • Method Details

    • strtointarray

      private ArrayList<Integer> strtointarray(String[] a)
      Helper method that converts an array of strings into an array of integers (the strings in this method are guaranteed to be integers)
      Parameters:
      a - The string arraylist to convert
      Returns:
      an Integer arraylist of the same numbers given

    • remove

      public void remove()
      Removes this ghost, setting alive to false

    • lastShapeEquals

      public boolean lastShapeEquals(int target)
      Checks if the last shape in the arraylist is the target shape
      Parameters:
      target - the shape index to look for
      Returns:
      whether the given shape index is the last shape

    • removeLast

      public void removeLast()
      Removes the last element of the shapes array. If the array is already empty, it doesn't do anything

    • isAlive

      public boolean isAlive()
      Checks if this ghost is alive
      Returns:
      whether the ghost is alive

    • shieldPause

      public void shieldPause(float delta)
      Changes isPausing for this ghost based on time (only for shields)
      Parameters:
      delta - the delta time in between frames

    • setFulk

      public void setFulk(boolean fulk)
      Changes the field isFulk based on the parameter
      Parameters:
      fulk - whether it is Fulk

    • isFish

      public boolean isFish()
      Returns whether this ghost is a fish
      Returns:
      whether this ghost is a fish

    • setFish

      public void setFish(boolean fish)
      Changes the field isFish based on the parameter
      Parameters:
      fish - whether it is a fish

    • isFulk

      public boolean isFulk()
      Returns whether this ghost is Mr. Fulk
      Returns:
      whether this ghost is Mr. Fulk

    • getDeathX

      public float getDeathX()
      returns the x position of the ghost's death
      Returns:
      the x position of death

    • getDeathY

      public float getDeathY()
      returns the x position of the ghost's death
      Returns:
      the x position of death

    • getStrlen

      public int getStrlen()
      Returns the number of shapes in the ghost
      Returns:
      the number of shapes in this ghost

    • getHorizontalDirection

      public float getHorizontalDirection()
      Returns the value of the field horizontal direction
      Returns:
      the value of horizontal direction

    • isShield

      public boolean isShield()
      Returns whether this ghost is a shield ghost
      Returns:
      whether this ghost is a shield ghost

    • setShield

      public void setShield(boolean shield)
      Changes this ghost to make it either a shielded or non-shielded ghost
      Parameters:
      shield - whether this ghost will become a shield ghost

    • getDEATH_DURATION

      public float getDEATH_DURATION()
      Returns the duration of a death
      Returns:
      the duration of a death (in seconds)

    • isPausing

      public boolean isPausing()
      Returns whether this ghost is paused
      Returns:
      whether this ghost is paused (used for shields)

    • setHorizontalDirection

      public void setHorizontalDirection(float dir)
      Sets the field horizontal direction to the parameter given
      Parameters:
      dir - the direction to set to

    • isDying

      public boolean isDying()
      Returns whether this ghost is dying
      Returns:
      whether this ghost is currently dying

    • setDying

      public void setDying(boolean dying)
      sets the ghost to dying or not dying
      Parameters:
      dying - whether the ghost is dying

    • getDeathTimer

      public float getDeathTimer()
      Returns the value of the death timer
      Returns:
      the value of the death timer

    • setDeathTimer

      public void setDeathTimer(float time)
      Setes the death timer to a specified value
      Parameters:
      time - the value of the death timer to set to

    • deathAnimation

      public void deathAnimation(float x, float y)
      Sets up this ghost's parameters during death (prior to the death animation)
      Parameters:
      x - the x position of this players death
      y - the y position of this players death

    • getShapes

      public ArrayList<Integer> getShapes()
      Returns the ArrayList of shapes on top of the ghost.
      Returns:
      an ArrayList of integers representing the shape indices
